series_metadata.series_title: Surface Mine Industrial Minerals Permit File-Operational Documents
series_metadata.series_description: Surface mine permit that is issued on or after July 1, 1975 for the mining of industrial minerals (IM) (other than coal) pursuant to R.C. Chapter 1514, but including incidental coal. This file contains the records generally associated with the review of IM applications and field operations of each IM mine. Records include, but are not limited to: enforcement actions, including terminated Chief''s Orders, quarterly production reports, paid civil penalty assessments and their associated documentation, bod releases (except the final bond release retiring permit), bond receipts, bond invoices, photos (including slides, photographs and digital photos), modification and amendment maps, annual maps, groundwater modeling withdrawn applications, and production reports for incidental operations. Records are added throughout the active life of the permit.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper records be retained five years expiration of period during which mining operation is active or is covered by any portion of a reclamation bond and ; Electronic: Electronic records retained five years expiration of period during which mining operation is active or is covered by any portion of a reclamation bond and
